name: Lily
description: Lily pads drifting on a quiet pond, each with a notch cut toward a new compass point after every redraw.

code.style: --pad: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --pd: @rand(64%, 86%); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: var(--pd); left: 8%; top: 8%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--pad); transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--color0); clip-path: polygon(50% 50%, @rand(70%, 100%) 0%, 100% @rand(0%, 30%)); transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
